sections.paragraph:
noun

Hasson (family name)

adjective

strong, powerful, well built, portly, solid, robust, stocky, chunky, sturdy, stalwart, husky, heavyset, lusty, thickset, beefy, impregnable, vigorous, bouncing

masculine noun חסון (>>חיסון)

immunization, vaccination, inoculation; strengthening, inurement
